title: Section 32
content: Every student of the University 1[other than a student of its Lok Siksha Samsad (People's Education Council)] shall reside in a 2[Chatravasa] or under such conditions as may be prescribed by the Statutes and the Ordinances.
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 60 of 1961, s. 13 (w.e.f. 19-12-1961). 2. Subs. by Act 31 of 1984, s. 20, for "Bhavana (College) or Chartavasa (Hostel)" (w.e.f. 8-8-1984).
